assumptions: The issue concerns hedge accounting under IFRS 9 for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
The recognised intragroup dividend receivable is being considered as a potential hedged item or as part of a hedging relationship.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of such items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a separate hedge accounting model, including for highly probable forecast transactions and variability in cash flows attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk.
